name: Fetuccine Primavera with Toasted Almonds
recipeIngredient: 1 cup asparagus or green bean pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli, cauliflower, and asparagus for 5-8 minutes, or until tender-crisp.
2. Cook the fettuccine in a large pot of salted boiling water for 5-7 minutes (or 12-15 minutes if using dried pasta), until tender but firm. Drain well.
3. Heat oil over medium-high heat in a large skillet. Sauté onion for 3-5 minutes, or until golden brown. Add carrot, red pepper, and garlic; sauté for 2-3 minutes, or until vegetables are tender-crisp.
4. Combine the drained pasta with the steamed broccoli mixture, vegetable stock or water, fresh basil (or dried), and black pepper. Toss in Parmesan cheese.
5. Arrange the dish on a serving platter and sprinkle with toasted sliced almonds.
